questions: how to become a content creator
answers: Become a creator: pick a platform (YouTube/Instagram/TikTok), choose your niche, create consistently, and engage with audience.
Content tips: hook viewers in first 3 seconds, provide value, be authentic, post consistently, and study analytics.
Content ideas: tutorials, behind-the-scenes, day-in-life, reviews, tips/hacks, Q&A, challenges, storytelling.
Content creation: platform choose koro, niche fix koro, consistent thako, audience er sathe engage koro, ar analytics dekho.
